# two packages: one drifts (added file), one clean -> summary counts 1 drift
exec git init
exec git config user.email t@example.com
exec git config user.name t
exec git config commit.gpgsign false

# commit 1: both packages in sync
exec git add a/SPEC.md a/a.go b/SPEC.md b/b.go
exec git commit -m init

# commit 2: add a/new.go (package a drifts); package b untouched
cp new.go.tmpl a/new.go
exec git add a/new.go
exec git commit -m edit

! psy check
stdout 'a: NG'
stdout 'new\.go \(added\)'
stdout 'b: OK'
stdout 'summary: 1 drift'

-- a/a.go --
package a
-- new.go.tmpl --
package a
-- a/SPEC.md --
---
package: a
---

# 文件

- `a.go` — a
-- b/b.go --
package b
-- b/SPEC.md --
---
package: b
---

# 文件

- `b.go` — b
